case_title: MURADYANTS, NONNA VS BERGER, ALEX IND. & DBA GEARY ANNEX

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO ALEX BERGER, OWNER & INDIV GEARY ANNEX RETURNED SIGNED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURADYANTS, NONNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERGER, ALEX IND. & DBA GEARY ANNEX DEFENDANT SHALL NOT SEEK REIMBURSEMENT FROM PLAINTIFF FOR THE $125.00 SHIPPING FEE CHARGED BY THE USPS FOR SHIPPING THE PARCEL TO MOSCOW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $553.48 FILED BY MURADYANTS, NONNA AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, ALEX IND. & DBA GEARY ANNEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
